prompts_findings.prompt_lead: Review this session and sharpen the generator's tactic beyond what the loop reached. Read ./ge

risks_fired.evidence: "Then rewrite ./generation-tactic.md. Integrate, don't append." — no explicit overwrite-in-place instruction; Claude will likely ask 'overwrite or create new?' before writing.
risks_fired.fix_hint: Add: 'Overwrite ./generation-tactic.md in place — do not create a new version.'

risks_fired.evidence: "Then rewrite ./generation-tactic.md. Integrate, don't append." — integration mode is named but overwrite/create-new boundary is implicit; a student who gets generation-tactic-v2.md loses the artifact chain.
risks_fired.fix_hint: Pair the integrate instruction with an explicit overwrite command naming the destination path.

risks_fired.evidence: "which tactic change helped, which one did not help and should be removed or rewritten" — Claude reviews tactic decisions it authored across the loop; RLHF charity toward its own prior work inflates the 'helped' count and shrinks the 'should be removed' list.
risks_fired.fix_hint: Add: 'Be harsher than feels comfortable — if a rule is vague, say so by name; if it fired on the wrong thing, name what it fired on.'

risks_fired.evidence: "tell me in 3–5 lines: what you added, what you sharpened, what you removed, and why" — self-summary of the tactic rewrite will inflate sharpening count and undercount removals; no artifact-level check prompt for the student to verify against.
risks_fired.fix_hint: Add a copyable push-back outside the fence: 'Which rule did you claim to remove but actually kept under a different name? Be specific.'

risks_fired.evidence: "remove a rule that fired on the wrong thing" — RLHF drift will prefer narrowing or renaming the rule rather than deleting it; no line is pinned as non-negotiable.
risks_fired.fix_hint: Pin the expected outcome: 'A removal means the rule is gone from the file, not renamed or scoped — if you scoped it instead, say so and why.'

risks_fired.evidence: Multi-part read-then-rewrite structure; Claude will open with a narrated plan before reading the first file.
risks_fired.fix_hint: Prime the student in surrounding prose: 'Claude will narrate the review plan briefly before acting; skim to the rewritten tactic file confirmation.'

rerun_note: PASS after Agents 101 rebase and surgical prompt/body edits on 2026-05-04; body-callout/self-audit calibration applied where evidence-backed Debriefs are intentional.
